title: ICanGamez Glowing Item Rarity
description: This is a small vanilla addition to minecraft adding glows to rare items matching their rarity color!
body:
# Glowing Item Rarities

This is a Quality of Life Datapack for dropped items
to glow their rarity. only works for items above the common rarity.
Just like the title says, Works on multiplayer, singleplayer, easy to use.
Have Fun!!
